race.comment: MILK FOAM (4) has returned in good order this prep and a maiden win appears imminent. Caught the eye last start when she stretched out nicely to get up for a close third over 1000m at Gosford. Back in trip is not perfect, but the long run home at Newcastle appeals. PRECIOUS GIRL (6) is back from a three-month spell. Raced three times over today's track and trip last prep for two placings and a close fifth. Consistent mare who is capable of taking this out. LOVE YOU ANYWAY (9) has been freshened up since a close second over 1000m at Port Macquarie on 6 January. Can run a cheeky race with the help of the inside gate. CREDIBILITY (1) placed in a recent Beaumont trial and is in the mix on debut for the Kris Lees stable.
